overall.description: A third-person game scene showing an armored character holding a torch exploring a rainy, dark forest at dusk. The character begins near a wooden cabin, observes an NPC walking away, then proceeds deep into the woods along a dirt path, eventually approaching a swampy area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cabin clearing at forest edge

events.description: NPC in red tunic walks away from the cabin toward the left side of the frame
character turns away from cabin and begins walking into the dark forest

agents.ego_description: standing near wooden cabin holding torch, watching NPC walk away, then turning to enter forest path

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking away from the cabin into the woods

entered.detail: small dark wooden building with sloped roof and lit window
simple wooden rail fence near the cabin entrance
dense dark trees forming the forest boundary in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens near a wooden cabin in a rainy forest at dusk. An armored character holds a torch while a villager in red clothing walks away into the trees. The character stands briefly before turning to follow a dirt path into the dark woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with hanging vines and mossy rocks

events.description: torch becomes primary light source as canopy thickens and ambient light fades
path curves right revealing moss-covered rocks and tree stumps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark forest, torch held high to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense wall on both sides of the path
weathered wooden stumps lining the left side of the trail
long mossy vines dangling from tree branches overhead
large boulders covered in green moss beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow forest trail enclosed by dense trees. The torch casts flickering light on tree stumps and hanging vines as rain falls through the canopy. The path winds past mossy rocks with visibility limited to the torch's glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with swamp water and rock formations

events.description: swamp water becomes visible on the right as trees thin out
approaching a clearing with large rock formations and more open sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path beside the swamp, navigating around trees and rocks

entered.detail: murky green water with reeds growing along the bank
massive moss-covered boulders scattered near the water's edge
rotting stumps with exposed roots along the path

changed.to: left_far only as right side opens to water

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a swampy area on the right with murky water and large rock formations. The character continues along the grassy path between the dense trees on the left and the water on the right, approaching a more open clearing as dusk deepens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest cabin into the deepening gloom of a rainy woodland that eventually opens into a swampy clearing. It begins near a wooden cabin at dusk, where an armored character holding a torch watches a villager in red walk away before turning to follow a dirt path into the trees. As the character proceeds, the scene shifts into a narrow trail enclosed by dense canopy and hanging vines, with the flickering torchlight providing the only visibility against the falling rain and mossy rocks. The forest then expands as the path winds toward a swampy area, revealing murky water and large rock formations to the right. Finally, the camera follows the character along a grassy verge between the thick woods and the water, moving toward an open clearing as the light of dusk fades.
